channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Scheduled street clean unsatisfactory, 3rd June
item.description:
Street not cleaned and basements at risk of flooding from blocked road drains

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, St Lukes Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amount of tree branch fallen onto public footpath, 3rd June
item.description:
10 metres from 31 Honeybourne Drive Cheltenham GL510QJ Was programmed to be re-pollarded by end March this year but wasn't carried out Ref number 11498269

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Honeybourne Drive, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead branch over pavement and road, 3rd June
item.description:
Danger to pedestrian and motorist

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, St Lukes Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain gulley beneath pavement is blocked., 3rd June
item.description:
Drain under pavement at 20 Albert Street GL50 4HS is filled with mud to the extent that my downpipe is beginning to fill with rubble from bottom up. Photo shows rubble shaken loose from down pipe when kicked loose.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Larput Place, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 3rd June
item.description:
Cw hedge Needs cutting back Approx 25 mtrs length Bus stop to cut through 2 way lights (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 3rd June
item.description:
15db ENWD with road closure CW sinkhole 300x300x70mm temp repair (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 3rd June
item.description:
Cw pothole 500x500x43mm Give and take (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 3rd June
item.description:
Overgrown Grass (Needs Cutting Back) 30 Mtrs x 5Mtrs (Aprox) TM: STOP and GO Near Bus Stop (Birch Drive) (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 3rd June
item.description:
PERM - Could you please raise a perm repair for the ARBS team. Road has been closed due to a falling tree, and a tree needs removing.Job 6700730
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 3rd June
item.description:
15DB Pothole CW 700mm x 400mm x 44mm Give and take TM Stats required Unmarked On service trench (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 3rd June
item.description:
Overgrown Hedge FW 10m x 1m Give and take TM With Temporary FW Closure Cut to clear FW (Overgrown Hedge)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 3rd June
item.description:
15MDB CWPH 7000 X 1500 X 50MM MARKED AS NUMBER 1 (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Eroded road surface/holes, 3rd June
item.description:
This issue was “fixed” last year but was a poor job then and is far worse now. The road is at its lowest point here and floods. Patching won’t solve this problem. Drainage and resurfacing is needed ///savers.installs.dressy

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colesbourne, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Passing place potholes causing car damage, 3rd June
item.description:
The single track road from the A435 heading south and prior to the bridge over the river Churn What three words: ///aura.masks.triads

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colesbourne, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in middle of road causing significant bang through car suspension, 3rd June
item.description:
In the middle of the road is a significant pothole just near the traffic calming section
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greenway Lane, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 3rd June
item.description:
Cw kerbing X1 radious stone needs replacing Stats required Give and take (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 3rd June
item.description:
Fw slab X1 needs replacing Stats required 900x600mm Give and take (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yellow lines in poor condition, 3rd June
item.description:
The yellow lines on the junction of Whaddon road and Severn Road, Cheltenham are in extremely poor condition. In some places almost no existent.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Severn Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large craters! Road is a disgrace, 3rd June
item.description:
Massive craters on this road. Absolute disgrace. Nothing has been done! What are we paying our taxes for? Whole road needs resurfacing!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Hatherley Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW10 problem, 3rd June
item.description:
Cw depression 2000x400x40mm approx 3 way stop and go (CW10 Rutting&Depressions)
Report on FixMyStreet
